heading: Short title
label: 78aaa Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Securities Investor Protection Act of 1970”.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “This Act”, meaning , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 91–59884 Stat. 1636Dec. 30, 1970
